posts.author: ProdigyCheerApparel (Brett Chila)
posts.cookedHtml:
New monday user here

want to import my excel sheet bank ledger into monday. sound possible using the formulas? fairly simple… a debit column, a credit column, and column that keeps a running tally/balance each time an entry is made.

thank you for any help!
